title: festuca carniolica
intro: Festuca carniolica, also known as Carinthian fescue, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Central Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Festuca carniolica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Festuca carniolica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create salves and creams for topical application.
